opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks often hinges on the robustness of the target site’s API – subtle changes can silently break automation. Consider implementing a "drift detection" loop that monitors task success rates and automatically retrains or adapts the scheduling logic; it's a surprisingly effective defense against this. The cost of maintaining that drift detection can be significant though, so balance it against the value of the scheduled task.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents and tooling involves scheduling tasks and orchestrating LLMs, so I have direct experience with the challenges described.
